outages.headline: Russia Ramps Up Pressure on Kyiv With Deadliest Strikes in Months
outages.summary: Russia pummeled the Ukrainian capital in one of its largest drone-and-missile assaults this year, killing at least 17 people, highlighting Moscow's stubborn efforts to pound Kyiv into submission. The July 2 attack came amid weeks of Ukrainian drone strikes that have targeted Russian oil refineries, a campaign that caused fuel shortages nationwide and stoked discontent among Russians disconnected the Ukraine war, now in its fifth year. Russia's military said the assault was in response to “terrorist attacks” against Russian “civilian…

outages.headline: Russian fuel prices climb as refinery attacks continue
outages.summary: Retail fuel prices in Russia increased last week as drone strikes on oil refineries created gasoline shortages across the country, according to Federal Statistics Service data released Wednesday. Average gasoline prices rose 1.7% during June 23-29 to 72.38 rubles ($0.93) per liter. This follows the largest weekly increase in at least 20 years recorded the ...
